---
title: "vector_config.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\engine\vector_config.py"
loc: 33
complexity: 5
logic_score: 7.22
style_score: 3.94
intel_score: 3.82
overall_score: 3.99
---

## Intent
The `vector_config.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on VectorConfig, __init__, load_json, load_stopwords, load_thesaurus. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via VectorConfig, __init__, load_json, load_stopwords, load_thesaurus. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [re](file://re)

### Exports
- `VectorConfig`
- `__init__`
- `load_json`
- `load_stopwords`
- `load_thesaurus`
